products.title: Voltas 183V Vectra CAW 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC
products.short_description: Affordable 1.5 Ton inverter split AC with fast cooling, 52°C performance, and copper condenser. Ideal for medium rooms.
products.long_description:
The Voltas 183V Vectra CAW 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC is designed for efficient and powerful cooling in medium-sized rooms (111–150 sq.ft). Equipped with an advanced inverter compressor, it adjusts power based on heat load, ensuring energy savings and consistent cooling performance.

This AC performs exceptionally well even in extreme Indian summers, delivering high ambient cooling up to 52°C. The 4-in-1 adjustable cooling mode allows users to control power consumption as per requirement, making it both flexible and cost-efficient.

The copper condenser ensures better heat transfer, durability, and lower maintenance compared to aluminum coils. It also features an anti-dust filter with antimicrobial protection to improve indoor air quality by trapping dust, allergens, and bacteria.

Additional features such as Turbo Cooling, Sleep Mode, Self Diagnosis, and wide voltage operation (110V–285V) make it a reliable choice for homes with voltage fluctuations. Overall, it is a value-for-money AC suitable for budget-conscious buyers looking for performance and durability.
highlights: 1.5 Ton capacity suitable for medium rooms (111–150 sq.ft)
3 Star energy efficiency with inverter compressor
pros: Fast cooling even in extreme heat
cons: Noise levels vary in some cases

seo.meta_description: Buy Voltas 1.5 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC with latest price, features, pros & cons. Best budget AC for Indian summer.
